name: Luxe Petals Boston
description: Boston's premier luxury floral house, specializing in dramatic, large-scale installations and opulent arrangements. Luxe Petals is the go-to for high-budget weddings that demand a jaw-dropping floral presence. Featured in Vogue Weddings and Martha Stewart.

includes: delivery and full setup with team
dedicated floral design team on-site all day
editorial.note: Our signature experience. Designed for weddings that want to be featured in publications.

personal_flowers.note: Bouquets and wearable flowers for the wedding party

ceremony_decor.note: Floral installations and decor for the ceremony space

reception_decor.note: Table florals, garlands, and decorative arrangements for the reception

extras.note: Full-scale luxury installations — floral walls, chandeliers, staircase garlands, and bespoke art pieces for the most dramatic weddings

seasonal_availability_notes: Sources globally to ensure any flower is available year-round. Premium import fees apply for off-season specialty blooms.

eco_friendly.note: We source globally to deliver the most exquisite blooms regardless of season. Sustainability is not our primary focus — beauty is.

consultation_process.note: By-appointment-only consultation at our studio. We create a full design presentation with mood boards and sample arrangements.

cancellation_policy.under_30_days: Full payment required — flowers sourced internationally with long lead times

highlights: floral wall was the talk of the night

sweeteners: Complimentary floral wall backdrop for receptions over $8000
Free bridal suite arrangement with full wedding packages
Exclusive access to rare imported varietals
Complimentary next-day bridal bouquet preservation and shadow box
personality: Confident, dramatic, and unapologetically luxurious. Luxe Petals sees florals as the centerpiece of a wedding, not an afterthought. They work exclusively with high-budget clients and deliver extraordinary results. Limited availability means they are selective about which weddings they take on.
